phase_name: Topic cache — train Nami's technical knowledge into local weights

last_result.hypothesis: HYP5: +4 HYP11 starter variants and +4 Aqua starter variants reinforcing '婕的 AI 夥伴' prefix. Goal: push topic recall 14/16 → 16/16 by densifying the 2 misses.
last_result.verdict: REVERT — bpb +36% vs HYP4 (0.1602→0.2179), persona regressed 5/5 → 3/5. Both metrics degraded by far more than the 5% threshold. 1200-chunk corpus + 45 min budget = only 20 epochs reached (vs HYP4's ~30) → severely under-trained. The 8 added variants pushed corpus past the compute budget's sweet spot.
last_result.reason: Lesson: at fixed 45-min budget, +1.6% corpus growth (1181→1200) cost ~33% epochs (30→20). The TOPIC_QA recall trade-off needs source curation (which HYP4 proved) more than variant addition. To push 14/16 → 16/16 we need either (a) longer budget (60 min in HYP9), (b) curate 2 misses' answers themselves rather than add Q-side variants, or (c) regression test before merge so we catch the under-train early.
last_result.topic_recall_hits: not probed — auto run only does 5 persona; trust persona 3/5 as proxy
